butler.noSubAlerts: No relevant alerts in the period.
butler.comfort.over80: Attention: over 80% of free cash already used on leisure/other.
butler.comfort.noMargin: No free cash margin; there is leisure/other spending.
butler.comfort.ok: Within the comfort limit for leisure/other.
butler.fallback.flat.business: Sir, expense volume stayed aligned with last month in cash flow. I suggest monitoring «{category}» to protect operating margin.
butler.fallback.flat.personal: Sir, household expenses remained stable compared to last month. We remain vigilant in the «{category}» category.
butler.fallback.up.business: Sir, I note a {pct}% increase in operating expenses this month, impacting cash flow and margin. I recommend reviewing «{category}» with the finance team.
butler.fallback.up.personal: Sir, I noticed a {pct}% increase in expenses this month in your household budget. I recommend reviewing «{category}» to maintain financial health.
butler.fallback.down.business: Excellent performance, Sir. Business expenses fell {pct}%, favoring margin and cash flow. Would you like to allocate this surplus to your «Emergency Reserve» goal?
butler.fallback.down.personal: Excellent performance, Sir. Household expenses decreased {pct}%. Would you like to allocate this surplus to your «Emergency Reserve» goal?
butler.summary.header: Financial summary for the current month ({month}):
butler.suspeitas.none: No relevant context suspicions this month.
